subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, the rightful Sovereign, Who encompasseth all souls and horizons, Who hath manifested the lights of His countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله المالک بالاستحقاق و المحیط علی الانفس و الافاق قد اظهر انوار وجهه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for teaching, @knowledge; recognition of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement
